session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/core/test_fast_llm.py -v && uv run ty check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py && uv run ruff check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py tests/core/test_fast_llm.py && uv run ruff format --check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py tests/core/test_fast_llm.py` and report all results. Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run all those commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest for fast_llm tests with verbose output

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py tests/core/test_fast_llm.py
Run ruff linter on both files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py tests/core/test_fast_llm.py
